mapper.select: SELECT s.student_id, s.user_id, s.student_no, s.name, s.gender, oc.org_name AS college_name, ok.org_name AS class_name, s.grade, s.phone, s.email FROM student_info s LEFT JOIN organization oc ON oc.org_id = s.college_id LEFT JOIN organization ok ON ok.org_id = s.class_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} LIMIT 1
